title: oenothera campestris subsp. parishii
intro: Oenothera campestris subsp. parishii, also known as Parish's evening primrose, is a perennial plant species belonging to the evening primrose family (Onagraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oenothera campestris subsp. parishii include potential relief from skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as anti-aging properties. Herbal preparations of the plant, including tea and extracts, are often used to promote skin health and reduce inflammation.
